raw_title: Strategizing Sustainability in Nonprofit News: Revenue Preferences of Newsroom Leaders
title_en: Strategizing Sustainability in Nonprofit News: Revenue Preferences of Newsroom Leaders
title_zh: 非营利新闻的可持续性战略：新闻编辑室领导者的收入偏好
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了非营利新闻机构如何实现财务可持续性，特别关注新闻编辑室领导者对不同收入来源的偏好。研究旨在了解这些领导者如何选择收入策略来维持新闻运营。
plain_summary_en: This research examines how nonprofit news organizations achieve financial sustainability, focusing specifically on newsroom leaders' preferences for different revenue sources. The study aims to understand how these leaders choose income strategies to sustain news operations.
research_direction_zh: 媒体经济学与非营利新闻机构的财务可持续性研究，关注领导决策对收入模式的影响。
research_direction_en: Media economics and financial sustainability research in nonprofit news organizations, focusing on how leadership decisions influence revenue models.
